steps.title: Create Medical Specialty
steps.done: Pre-check found no METABOLIC-2026; created Test Type 'METABOLIC-2026' (MSS Genetic 2026, display METABOLIC, sheet tab gid 1062009916). SOAP Note Template copied from IMMUNODEFICIENCY 2026; metadata template applied as-is.
steps.note: Canonical key tt-metabolic-2026 was held by a soft-deleted/admin-hidden record and could not be reused; per user approval the alt key tt-metabolic-2026-amedix was used for both Key and Git Sync Key.

decisions.question: Which dashboard base URL to use?
Title 'METABOLIC DISORDERS' has no Short Code table match — which Short Code?
decisions.note: First-word fallback; drives METABOLIC-2026 / tt-metabolic-... / 'METABOLIC Amedix'.

decisions.question: Key 'tt-metabolic-2026' is taken by a hidden record — how to proceed?
decisions.note: Canonical key held by a soft-deleted/admin-hidden Test Type (not editable via UI).

steps.title: Create ReqForm
steps.done: Created Medical Rec Form 'METABOLIC - Amedix 2026' (Lab Amedix, Medical Speciality METABOLIC-2026, sheet tab 'Metabolic Amedix' gid 1838619590, Is Default unchecked).
steps.note: First save with Name='Amedix' returned HTTP 500 (rolled back). Per workflow retry, Name was set to the full Description 'METABOLIC - Amedix 2026' and the save succeeded.

steps.title: Sync CSV
steps.done: Selected the new ReqForm and ran the Sync CSV admin action. Confirmation shown: 'Syncing process has been started! You can look over it from Sequence Tracker'.

steps.title: Flatten PDF
steps.done: Flattened the original PDF locally with Ghostscript (pdfimage24, 300dpi, 4 pages) -> 'Metabolic Disorders Panel - Amedix Inc-flatten-pdf.pdf' (850 KB).

decisions.question: Which flatten method for the batch?

steps.title: Import PDF
steps.done: Uploaded the flattened PDF via Import PDF, mapped to ReqForm 'METABOLIC - Amedix 2026'. Verified it appears in Medical PDFs.

steps.title: Create Form.io order services form
steps.done: Form '[DEV] [AI] order services Metabolic Amedix' (id -OvDN5ZeZl-E7Ce8A6WJ). Final structure has 8 Test Panels — each disease area split by methodology: METACORE-Dx / HEPATOMET-Dx / NEUROMYO-PLEX / MITOGENOME-360, each as 'PCR/MLPA / Repeat Expansion — Adult/Elderly Patients' AND 'NGS Panel', with matching per-panel Test Parameters, conditional show/validate, and an 8-arm aggregator. Restrict-to-Pediatrics options + extended pediatric panels excluded. 8 Clinical Indications, clinical-history fields, and the 3 fixed fields (Additional Clinical Context, Relevant Diagnosis system-fed dataSrc:custom, Instructions) retained. Schema URL linked into the ReqForm Metadata (order_form_link).
steps.note: Schema URL: https://dev-rce-dashboard.firebaseio.com/forms/-OvDN5ZeZl-E7Ce8A6WJ/schema.json. Relevant Diagnosis kept optional (Medicare 'required' enhancement not applied, per user choice).

decisions.question: Target AI order-services form already exists — edit or skip?
decisions.note: Initial decision; form was already complete and accurate.

decisions.question: Test Panel structure (label/value confirmation, step 4a)?
options: 4 panels (one per disease area, NGS+PCR combined)
8 panels (split each disease area by methodology)
decisions.recommended: 4 panels (one per disease area, NGS+PCR combined)
decisions.chosen: 8 panels (split each disease area by methodology)
decisions.note: User-requested split: e.g. METACORE-Dx | PCR/MLPA … + METACORE-Dx | NGS Panel. Restrict-to-Pediatrics dropped. Conditionals + aggregator re-synced.

decisions.question: Mitochondrial panel disease name?
decisions.note: PDF prints 'MITOGENOME-360' with a superscript degree sign (the trailing 0 was an OCR artifact).

steps.title: Final confirm
steps.done: Reviewed the finished recform (ReqForm change page with linked metadata, and the 8-panel Form.io order services form). User confirmed it looks correct.

decisions.question: Does the finished METABOLIC - Amedix 2026 recform look correct?
